label: DEMO_FIXTURE
provenance: Generated by apps/console/tooling/generate-fixture.gen.ts running the real @aukora organism + one offline @aukora/council pass. Deterministic, offline, no cloud, no paid call, no live-repo mutation.

meta.title: Aukora — Governed Organism Operator Console
meta.subtitle: Read-only investor view of a governed, growing, remembering organism.

truthLegend.IMPLEMENTED: source + test + demo prove it here
truthLegend.ROADMAP: designed / wired elsewhere; not proven on this path

authority.title: AUMLOK authority
authority.gate: Owner-gate — Ed25519 signature over the canonical proposal digest
authority.productionSuite: aumlok-ed25519-ml-dsa-65-v1 — hybrid Ed25519 + ML-DSA-65 verify (verifyAumlokPromotionV2 in @aukora/kernel/authority)
authority.note: Advisory review authorizes nothing; only a valid owner signature does. The console cannot sign.

memory.title: Reactive memory
memory.note: Snapshot recomputes on every ingest/forget; live memory count strictly rises across ingests.

lineage.title: Receipt & Merkle lineage
lineage.note: Append-only receipt chain (memories + content-free tombstones); the canonical verifier detects any tampered link. Entries carry hashes and kinds only — never plaintext.

refusedWithoutOwner.meaning: advisory review ran and PASSED, yet the owner-gate refused — review never authorizes.

acceptedWithOwner.meaning: owner-signed → applied to an ISOLATED in-memory sandbox; the live repository is never written.

staleness.note: Expiry means flagged, never hidden; a stale or unknown-age proposal cannot mint a signing challenge without an explicit owner revive.

council.title: Aukora Fu council
council.transport: deterministic offline — no live provider contacted, no paid call
council.note: The council is EVIDENCE, never authority. It surfaces disagreement (shear) rather than hiding it; its verdict authorizes nothing.

providers.title: Providers

offlineProvider.note: same prompt ⇒ same output; no network, reproducible

manifest.label: Auma-VL LoRA ladder (v5..v17 reported; provenance pending)

providers.note: Truth labels only — no weights, endpoint IDs, job IDs, bucket IDs, or tokens. A provider grants no authority.

budget.title: Budget & hard-stop
budget.note: Whole-pass projection refuses to start before any paid call; unknown/zero prices fail HIGH so an estimate can never sneak under a ceiling. An append-only JSONL ledger holds the day cap across processes. This pass ran offline: actual $0.

convex.title: Persistence mode
convex.note: This run uses the deterministic in-memory reactive adapter and makes NO live-cloud claim. The curated Convex backend (apps/brain/convex) mirrors the same contracts; convex-test wiring is the next step.

g1.title: G1 / Nebius replication
g1.replication: G1 self-replication stays QUARANTINE / unarmed on this path
g1.nebius: not contacted — offline. No endpoint IDs, job IDs, bucket IDs, or tokens are present in this console.
g1.note: Not claimed: self-replicating, alive, or conscious. Liquid / Nemotron are BLOCKED; the router seed is DESIGN_ONLY until artifacts prove otherwise.

forgetting.title: Governed forgetting
forgetting.note: Owner-authorized tombstone → the content is invisible to recall and never surfaced again; a content-free audit that it existed and was forgotten is kept; the historical chain is never rewritten.
